text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Hopeful Stakes. Mejiro Dober, who
won her own G1 earlier, comes to the track to
show her support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, concerned by how relaxed both Mejiro
Bright and I seem, she asks if we're truly ready for
the G1 race ahead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I believe Mejiro Bright is fine as is. I've put my
trust in her, letting her know all she has to do is
keep her cool.
